sections.label: Introduction concepts
sections.coverage_goal: Account for ability scores, d20 resolution, proficiency, and advantage/disadvantage.

sections.label: Races and species
sections.coverage_goal: Account for every playable PHB ancestry and subrace.

sections.label: Classes

sections.label: Backgrounds
sections.coverage_goal: Account for skills, tools, equipment, feature, and characteristics.

sections.label: Equipment
sections.coverage_goal: Account for weapons, armor, packs, gear, tools, mounts, and vehicles.

sections.label: Combat
sections.coverage_goal: Account for actions, movement, conditions, attack resolution, and damage.

sections.label: Adventuring
sections.coverage_goal: Account for exploration, travel, vision, resting, and environment rules.

sections.label: Spellcasting
sections.coverage_goal: Account for spellcasting rules, components, preparation, slots, and concentration.

sections.label: Spell index
sections.coverage_goal: Reserve a complete structured slot for every PHB spell.

sections.label: Appendices and hooks
sections.coverage_goal: Account for conditions, gods, planes, inspiration hooks, and future DMG/MM extension points.
